---
title: "Malaria Control Strategy Lab"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1200px
---

This lab allows you to explore different malaria control strategies given a fixed budget.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
config <- yaml::read_yaml("config.yaml")
modules <- config$modules

cat('<div class="row g-4 mt-3">\n')
for (mod in modules) {
  href <- paste0("docs/", mod$href)
  cat(sprintf(
    paste0(
      '<div class="col-md-4">\n',
      '<a href="%s" class="text-decoration-none">\n',
      '<div class="card module-card h-100">\n',
      '<div class="card-body">\n',
      '<div class="module-icon">%s</div>\n',
      '<h5 class="card-title">%s</h5>\n',
      '<p class="card-text text-muted">%s</p>\n',
      '</div>\n',
      '</div>\n',
      '</a>\n',
      '</div>\n'
    ),
    href, mod$icon, mod$title, mod$description
  ))
}
cat("</div>\n")
```
